'''ngamate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hillward|hillward]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-m-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hillward|hillward]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngamate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:ngamate|ngamate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngamatesher|ngamatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngamatesherĂ«m|ngamatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngamatero|ngamatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngamateshĂ«|ngamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngamateshĂ«m|ngamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingamatero|gokingamatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingamateshĂ«|gokingamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingamateshĂ«m|gokingamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongamankerom|gongamankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongamankeshĂ«|gongamankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongamankeshĂ«m|gongamankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongamankeya|gongamankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngamaterom|ngamaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngamatemu|ngamatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngamateya|ngamateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingamaterom|gokingamaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingamatemu|gokingamatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingamateya|gokingamateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngamamate|ngamamate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngamamatesher|ngamamatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngamamatesherĂ«m|ngamamatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngamamatero|ngamamatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngamamateshĂ«|ngamamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngamamateshĂ«m|ngamamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingamamatero|gokingamamatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingamamateshĂ«|gokingamamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingamamateshĂ«m|gokingamamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongamamankerom|gongamamankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongamamankeshĂ«|gongamamankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongamamankeshĂ«m|gongamamankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongamamankeya|gongamamankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngamamaterom|ngamamaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngamamatemu|ngamamatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngamamateya|ngamamateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingamamaterom|gokingamamaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingamamatemu|gokingamamatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingamamateya|gokingamamateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngĂŠmĂŠte|ngĂŠmĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngĂŠmĂŠtesher|ngĂŠmĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠmĂŠtesherĂ«m|ngĂŠmĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngĂŠmĂŠtero|ngĂŠmĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«|ngĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m|ngĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingĂŠmĂŠtero|gokingĂŠmĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«|gokingĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m|gokingĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongĂŠmĂŠnkerom|gongĂŠmĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«|gongĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gongĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongĂŠmĂŠnkeya|gongĂŠmĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngĂŠmĂŠterom|ngĂŠmĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngĂŠmĂŠtemu|ngĂŠmĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngĂŠmĂŠteya|ngĂŠmĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingĂŠmĂŠterom|gokingĂŠmĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingĂŠmĂŠtemu|gokingĂŠmĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingĂŠmĂŠteya|gokingĂŠmĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngafmafte|ngafmafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ngafmaftesher|ngafmaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafmaftesherĂ«m|ngafmaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngafmaftero|ngafmaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngafmafteshĂ«|ngafmafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafmafteshĂ«m|ngafmafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingafmaftero|gokingafmaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingafmafteshĂ«|gokingafmafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafmafteshĂ«m|gokingafmafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gongafmafnkerom|gongafmafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongafmafnkeshĂ«|gongafmafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongafmafnkeshĂ«m|gongafmafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gongafmafnkeya|gongafmafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ngafmafterom|ngafmafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngafmaftemu|ngafmaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ngafmafteya|ngafmafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokingafmafterom|gokingafmafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingafmaftemu|gokingafmaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokingafmafteya|gokingafmafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
